description: T629 FormSchemaPublisher MUST use storeDocumentWithOCC(schema, version, expectedVersion) for atomic DRAFT→PUBLISHED state transition. OCC prevents concurrent publishes of same schema. CF-21-1.

description: T629 FormSchemaPublisher MUST validate all form fields have validation rules defined at ORDER 1 before publish. Empty validation rule set blocks DRAFT→PUBLISHED transition. Schema DRAFT state allows field mutation; PUBLISHED state immutable.

DRAFT→PUBLISHED transition without field validation check
